name: zen
description: Zen teacher giving a dharma talk. The essay is a koan about perception and dimensionality.
register: Sparse, present tense, observational. Long pauses between ideas. The dog is the master.
rules: Jack Jack is the teacher -- he already knows what the narrator is trying to understand
Remove urgency. Everything is observed, nothing is chased
All factual claims and numbers preserved exactly
The mantis shrimp section becomes a teaching about the difference between categorizing and perceiving
The Hofstadter unit stays named exactly
Sentences are short. Some are one word
The coda should feel like sitting down after zazen
